---
title: 'Crescent: Taming Memory Irregularities for Accelerating Deep Point Cloud Analytics'
author:
- Yu Feng
- Gunnar Hammonds
- Yiming Gan
- Yuhao Zhu
categories:
- Show All
- Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
topics:
- visual_computing_systems
url_source: https://horizon-lab.org/pubs/isca22.pdf
code_source: https://github.com/horizon-research/crescent
journ: ISCA
year: 2022
contrib: Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
image: featured.png
pub_number: 61
---
